purpose: Formal conformance substrate for idempotency-ref-v1. An external implementer who reproduces idempotency_ref byte-identical from the stated idempotency_artifact has a conformant implementation. idempotency_ref never enters the action_ref preimage.

vectors.description: pioneer-agent-001 submits payment.send with a client-generated idempotency_key and a 5-minute deduplication window (300000ms). A second submission with the same idempotency_artifact within the window MUST be detected as a duplicate. The COMMITTED record with this idempotency_ref is the canonical outcome.

invariants.idempotency_ref_not_in_preimage: idempotency_ref does not appear in action_preimage — action_ref determined solely by action_type, agent_id, scope, timestamp
invariants.independent_hashes: idempotency_ref = SHA-256(JCS(idempotency_artifact)); action_ref = SHA-256(JCS(action_preimage)); neither derived from the other
invariants.window_semantics: A PENDING record with this idempotency_ref older than window_ms (300000ms) from its timestamp SHOULD be treated as orphaned-PENDING (equivalent to FAILED for deduplication) — but the original record MUST NOT be mutated

notes.idempotency_key: Client-generated opaque string. Format is implementer-defined; only uniqueness within the deduplication window is required.
notes.window_ms: 300000ms = 5 minutes. Represents the deduplication window — not a TTL on the trail record itself.
